name: Dr. Tanya Mukherjee
bio: Dr. Tanya Mukherjee heads the Theoretical Computer Science group where she works on approximation algorithms for NP-hard combinatorial optimization problems arising in cloud resource allocation and network design. Her paper on a 1.5-approximation for deadline-constrained virtual machine placement under stochastic demand is a standard reference in cloud scheduling. She also studies the complexity of fair division problems, recently proving tight lower bounds for envy-free cake-cutting with connected pieces. She teaches the flagship graduate course on randomized algorithms and runs the university's competitive programming team.
